questions.question: Which Boolean logic gate outputs a HIGH (1) only when ALL of its inputs are HIGH (1)?
In a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA), what is the primary component within a Configurable Logic Block (CLB) that is responsible for implementing arbitrary Boolean functions?
In a virtual memory system, what is the primary purpose of a Translation Lookaside Buffer (TLB)?
options: To store frequently accessed data blocks from main memory for faster CPU access.
To cache recently used page table entries, accelerating virtual-to-physical address translation.
To ensure data consistency across multiple CPU caches in a multiprocessor system.
To buffer incoming I/O requests before they are processed by the CPU.
To store microcode for complex instruction execution sequences.

questions.question: What design methodology aims to optimize an integrated circuit layout to reduce sensitivity to manufacturing process variations and improve overall yield?
In a modern out-of-order execution processor, what is the primary role of the Reorder Buffer (ROB)?
options: To store instructions waiting to be issued to execution units.
To manage the mapping between architectural and physical registers for renaming purposes.
To ensure that instructions commit (update architectural state) in their original program order and facilitate precise exceptions.
To buffer data between different levels of the cache hierarchy.
To store predicted branch outcomes and target addresses.
